narrative.headline: 2020 Jeep Gladiator: steering and electrical issues top owner complaints
narrative.summary: Across 477 owner complaints to NHTSA, steering is the most-reported area at 181 reports (38%), with the electrical system close behind at 178 reports (37%). Power train, engine, and suspension follow well behind. Most reports involve no crash, fire, or injury, but the power train category stands out with 4 fires, 2 crashes, and 2 injuries.

issues.sample: I HAVE OWNED THIS TRUCK 3 WEEKS NOW AND ABOUT 1,000 MILES. THE ISSUE I HAVE US WITH THE STEERING AT HIGHWAY SPEEDS ESPECIALLY.  I HAVE NEVER DRIVEN A MODERN DAY VEHICLE WITH THIS MUCH STEERING PLAY. THIS PAST WEEKEND I TOOK A MOSTLY HIGHWAY TRIP AND IT WAS MENTALLY EXHAUSTING TO
issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: Most-reported area: 181 complaints (38%), including 2 crashes, with no fires or injuries reported. Owners describe excessive steering play and wandering at highway speeds that makes the truck tiring to drive.

issues.sample: STEERING; SCARY TO DRIVE ON HWY. MANUAL TRANSMISSION FEELS LIKE IT GRINDS CLUTCH RELATED I THOUGHT THAT WAS NORMAL CAUSE IT WAS BRAND NEW AND NOT BROKEN IN. NOT SO PROBLEM STILL THERE. BACK UP CAMERA DOESN'T ALWAYS ENGAGE I WONDER IF THE MANUAL SHIFTING HAS ANY FLAWS. TOO MUCH CR
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Nearly tied for the lead: 178 complaints (37%), including 2 fires and 1 injury. Owners report problems such as a backup camera that does not always turn on.

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2020 JEEP GLADIATOR. WHEN THE CONTACT ATTEMPTED TO ENGAGE THE SELECT SPEED CONTROL, THE VEHICLE MADE A METAL TO METAL GRINDING NOISE COMING FROM THE FRONT DRIVER'S SIDE. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THE FAILURE OCCURRED TWICE. THE VEHICLE WAS NOT TAKEN TO THE DE
issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: 53 complaints (11%), but the most serious category here: 4 fires, 2 crashes, and 2 injuries. Owners describe a metal-to-metal grinding noise from the front driver's side.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: 45 complaints (9%), including 3 fires and 1 crash, with no injuries reported. One owner describes hot air coming in near the pedals while driving, even with the AC running cold.

issues.title: Suspension
issues.blurb: 32 complaints (7%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries reported. Owners say the truck wanders off the road and is hard to keep in its lane.
